global.description: The ad features a prominent logo, app screenshots, and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting late-night food delivery with a focus on user-generated content.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'BiteRush' in a bold font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: App screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular area displaying three empty placeholders for images, suggesting a gallery or product showcase.

elements.label: App screenshot
elements.description: Another rectangular area similar to the previous one, indicating more placeholders for images.

elements.label: App screenshot
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area with a placeholder for an image, positioned to the left of the larger screenshots.

elements.label: App screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular area with a placeholder for an image, positioned to the right of the smaller screenshot.

elements.label: App screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular area displaying a placeholder for an image, slightly lower than the other screenshots.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangular area with a placeholder, adding visual interest to the layout.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small rectangular area with a placeholder, complementing the previous decorative element.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangular area with a placeholder, positioned below the main app screenshots.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Your cravings, delivered Late night deals available', centrally positioned at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Late Hable Shop now

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: Text reading 'BiteRush' in a prominent font, located at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: Text labeled 'UGC' in a small font, located at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and playful, BiteRush logo, app screenshots, sale badge.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by app screenshots in the center, and the main message text at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BiteRush, SALE, UGC, Your cravings, delivered, Late night deals available, Shop now
